title: EC Samurai Dynasty Compat
description: adds compatability between Expanded Combat and Epic Samurai's
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-epic-samurai-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![L_Ender's Cataclysm Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd696effc08fd790efe81cf4a2f8fbe99dca7e0b.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Samurai Dynasty's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-samurais). ### adds support for: Steel - shields, arrows, bows, crossbows, weapons, quivers, and gauntlets. \ Ninja armor - all five types and standard cloth - gauntlets \ Coated Steel - Amethyst and Quartz - gauntlets \ Silver - gauntlets \ Straw - gauntlets \ \ Click the banner to get the discount:
